name: Spinner
description: A loading spinner component for indicating indeterminate loading or processing states.
usage_guidelines: Set appropriate size based on context.
Use enableTheme to apply theme colors.
Provide custom indicator for branded spinners.

styling_info.visual_description: A circular spinning icon with rotating animation. Default is a circle with partial stroke. Customizable size and color.

Dont: Don't use for determinate progress (use Progress instead)
Don't make spinner too large or too small
Don't forget to remove when loading completes
